entry.title: Re: Plan cost not flow in EPPM in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Publi...
entry.content:
Hi @Deepanshu9892 

Please refer to the below KBA for this issue
3453098 - Plan costs, budget, actual costs not displayed in project reports

Regards,
Monisha.

entry.title: Custom Movement Types in Inventory Management Fiori apps
entry.content:
Introduction

Custom movement types in Inventory Management - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - are variations of standard movement types that have been tailored to meet specific business requirements. These custom movement types can be identified by their initial character because they always start with 9, X, Y, or Z.

Creating a custom movement type is useful when you need more detailed specifications for a particular business process. The most straightforward method to create a custom movement type is to copy an existing standard movement type and then modify it according to your specific needs.

Custom movement types are currently only supported for Fiori apps Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document (F0843), Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery (F2502) and Post Goods Receipt for Production Order (F3110), Post Goods Receipt for Process Order (F3244) and Post Subsequent Adjustment (F5476) via Cloud BAdI MIM_GR4XY_PROVIDE_DATA.

Note: This functionality only supports the main items of subcontracting purchase orders. Movement types for sub-items in subcontracting purchase orders cannot be modified.

Example

For example, let's say that a company needs to use movement type 101 -post goods receipt - but wants to post the goods receipt to a different account. To achieve this, they must first copy movement type 101. The following shows you how:

  1. In your configuration environment, find and open the configuration activity Copy of Movement Type (ID 103898).
  2. Select the row for movement type 101.
  3. Choose "Copy as" in the top toolbar. A new screen will open.
  4. In the Movement Type field, enter a new 3-character key of your choice. It must begin with 9, X, Y, or Z. For this example, we will use Z01.
  5. Choose Apply.
  6. To add a new text description for your new movement type, choose the row for the new movement type Z01.
  7. In the Dialog Structure, double-click on Short Texts.
  8. Choose Position.
  9. In the pop up, using an example of a company using English, enter the following: Language: EN, Movement Type: 901
  10. Choose Continue.
  11. Under Movement Type Text, enter a new description for your new movement type and press enter.
  12. Choose Save.
  13. To change the Help Texts for your new custom movement type, double-click Help Texts in the Dialog Structure.
  14. Enter your new texts into the Text column. Note: You must maintain the Help Texts for transaction code MIGO and, if available, MB11.
  15. Choose Save.

Note: If you create a custom movement type, we recommend creating a corresponding reversal movement type immediately. You can use the configuration activity Set Reversal Movement Types (ID 104062).

 

Custom Movement Types for Fiori apps

After creating your custom movement type, you must implement the BAdI MMIM_GR4XY_PROVIDE_DATA to enable the use of your new movement type in one of the supported Goods Receipt Fiori apps.

It is also possible to modify the control field logic in connection with the copied movement type (see example below). For more information about this BAdI, refer to App Extensibility: Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document.

All Goods Receipt Fiori apps support custom movement types using the above-mentioned BAdI, except for the Post Goods Receipt without Reference app. You can also implement the BAdI MMIM_GR4XY_CHECK_DATA to apply custom validation logic for the copied movement type before posting the material document.

The primary use case for copying a movement type is to enable customers to modify account determination when posting a goods receipt. However, it is also possible to implement different control field behavior for the copied movement type compared to the original, supported by the above-mentioned BAdI.

Example: Posting a Goods Receipt with a Reason Code

  • Original Movement Type 101: Does not require a reason code entry (field is suppressed).
  • Copied Movement Type Z01: Configured to require a reason code entry.

Cases:

  1. Without Control Field Logic Changes: The reason code entry remains suppressed when posting a goods receipt with a Fiori app.
  2. With Control Field Logic Changes: Implementing changes for the copied movement type supports posting a goods receipt using Z01 in the Fiori app, including the required reason code entry.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Windows Keyboard delay
entry.content: Unfortunately, we were unable to detect any abnormalities in relation to the CPU or memory or other programs

entry.title: Re: BW Datasouce : Is it need to clean SMQ1 and RSA7 befo...
entry.content:
Hi Charlie
LBWQ (PreQueue) und RSA7 (BW Queue) need to be empty to re-initialize LO 2LIS DataSource.
Unless there will be "old" delta records in future, which you do want to avoid at any rate.
In addition the setup tables need to cleared, unless the initial loads of the past would be still there...


Hope that helps.

Regards Frank

entry.title: Re: How to find Technical User mentioned during remote so...
entry.content:
For the remote source credentials, we can tell from DP agent log, do a connection test for the remote source, search in the DP agent log for something like below example for CamelJDBCAdapter Open remote source [remote_source_name]. Parameters: {localDriverFolder=, pds_use_agent_stored_credential=false, db_credential_user=token, url=, filename=, filepath=, dbname=, port=, driverClass=, dbtype=other, host=, servername=, db_credential_password=******, remote_source_name=} Different adapter might have different log information like above. There is no way for us to tell who start the subscription. But you can run the following query to tell the owner of the subscriptions.

SELECT O.OWNER_NAME, RS.REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME, RS.SUBSCRIPTION_NAME FROM OWNERSHIP O INNER JOIN remote_subscriptions RS ON O.OBJECT_OID = RS.SUBSCRIPTION_OID WHERE RS.REMOTE_SOURCE_NAME ='Remote_source_name'

Usually for XSC, owner is _SYS_REPO, for XSA, owner is **#OO

entry.title: Re: Is Windows Server 2022 supported by SAP CC 2023
entry.content:
Hello Doris ,

for now, there is now plan for an upgrade of the SAP CC PAM regarding Windows server. 

Nevertheless, I will update you here as soon as the SAP CC product team has a commitment. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

Is it possible to use only the IPS portion of CIS or do you have to make use of both IPS and IAS (for authentication) when using CIS?

entry.title: How to retrieve who the current approver of a work item is from top-level work item ids?
entry.content:
Hi

I have a cds view that generates a report of work items from the swwwihead and swwuserwi tables. I have already used the field user_id but it has many blanks for the approvers columns. Upon further inspection in SE11 under table SWWUSERWI, it seems that these records do not exist but are present in the SWWWIHEAD table, is this because they are top level work items? If so, how can this be used to pull the actual current approver?

define view Test_Report as select from swwwihead as x

left outer join swwwihead as z on x.wi_id = z.top_wi_id
and z.wi_type =  'W'
and z.wi_stat <> 'COMPLETED'

left outer join swwuserwi as y on z.wi_id = y.wi_id
{
x.wi_id   as WorkItemID
y.user_id as Approver
}

entry.title: Re: S2S VPN requirement?
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

My assumption is that you're referring to RISE on Microsoft Azure. There are several scenarios available (see this blog) whereas generally besides VPN one could alternatively as well go with a dedicated Private Connection or VPC / VNET Peering.

In case your customer moves all systems to RISE and no further connectivity to the old environments is needed anymore, this route can be dismantled.

Best regards,
Tomasz

entry.title: Re: Querry Convert KPI to Characteristics
entry.content:
Hi,

i guess i found the answer:

I found a hint how this should work.

it seemded to be called  "virtual KPI" or "virtual Characteristics".

Its implemented with BADI RSR_LOAP_BADI.

The Implementation is quite lengthy:

You find it in: 
"ABAP Programming für SAP BW - User Exits und Badis" from Gallileo Press, Chapter 5.2.
In German but with extensive Codeing samples,
The booklet is only used available.

Best Martin

entry.title: Re: Sap sd
entry.content: @Vivek_Savant The requirement is that the price should be picked based on the batch. For example, if one batch is created in January and another in December for the same material, the batch with the current price (created in January) should be selected in the sales order or delivery, even if the December batch exists.

entry.title: Re: FBL*H transactions - OOM Dump(STATEMENT_MEMORY_LIMIT_FROM_GLOBAL_CONFIG) and analysis
entry.content:
How did you set this parameter statement_memory_limit

  • KBA 3211034 - Recommended value for parameter statement_memory_limit 
  • KBA 3217339 - statement_memory_limit has been set to -1

entry.title: Re: Does sybase databse version 16.0.2.8 support SUSE Linux Enterprise Server (SLES) 15 SP5 and SP6?
entry.content: Also, I noticed that SAP Sybase ASE dataserver executable version 16.0 SP04 PL05 or lower cannot be executed on a Linux system with GLIBC 2.36 and higher. For more information, see the SAP note 3425215 - SYB: dataserver fails to execute on Linux with GLIBC 2.36 and higher - SAP for Me.

entry.title: Re: PS WBS Settings
entry.content:
Hi @controllingprinc34 

When you set the statistical flag for a project, this flag applies to the WBS elements present in the project hierarchy. Upon saving the project for the first time, you cannot change the selection of this flag.

Please refer to the below SAP Help Documentation for the same,
Statistical Project 

Regards,
Monisha.

entry.title: Re: PS WBS Settings
entry.content: Thanks for your answer @Monisha_Sivaram. The project is not statistical. Some of the wbs connected to the project are statistical and some are not. I don't want to fix this and never experience it again.

entry.title: Re: PS WBS Settings

entry.title: Re: I encountered different net value vs. the condtype va...
entry.content: Your pricing procedure configuration seems to be wrong.  From your screen shot, I could see the net value of PR01 is 1430.00 and there are multiple discounts which totalling to 432.93.  So if you deduct this value from net value, it should be 997.07.  Also, the pricing condition type ZPNT has considered all the discounts plus tax also and that is why, it shows 890.24

entry.title: Supplier Reference: ABC Infraequipment Pvt Ltd - SAP Business Network for Procurement
entry.content:
Link to the quote card: https://www.sap.com/documents/2024/08/48834a68-d07e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Supplier testimonials covering positive experiences/impact on their business process (s) once they started collaborating with their buyers on SAP Business Network.

Supplier share their stories in form of a quote card or video. These assets are then published on SAP Social sites which in turn helps them increase their visibility globally & also help other suppliers to gain more confidence on using the SAP Business Network.

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content: Hi guys,

entry.title: Reorg during Compensation Cycle
entry.content:
Hey all,

quick question.

We are currently within a compensation cycle and the sheets are launched. We startet the sheets, which are connected with employee central to the effective date 01.01.25. 

Now we have a reorganisation as of 01.01.25. Some managers are getting new managers. The new timesheet in their job information has been added on the 09th of january, with effective date 01.01.

 

When I update the specific worksheets (where the employee should be removed and the other one where the employee should be added) and check the checkboxes for add newly eligible worksheet and all the other relevant checkboxes still nothing happens. 

 

Do I need to delete and add all the specific employees manually? Is there no automatisation?

Thank you for any type of help!

Best regards,

Linda

 

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Issue trying to link project attached documents to their respective project stage.
entry.content:
Hello,

I couldn't find any solution to this on this forum. If there is one, apologies in advance and could anyone please link it!

I'm trying to query for a specific project basically its stages and if there are attached marketing documents to them, with a link to that document. The problem is that no matter what I try I always get as a result a permutation of all the document lines with all the stages, so the information on what stage they are specifically assigned to is lost.

Here's an example of a starter version of the query:

SELECT T4."DocEntry" AS "Link", T3."DocEntry" AS "Link", T2."NAME" AS "Project Name", T1."UniqueID" AS "UniqueID", T1."StageID" AS "Stage ID", T0."DOCNUM" AS "Doc number", T0."Total" AS "Total" FROM PMG4 T0 INNER JOIN PMG1 T1 ON T1."AbsEntry" = T0."AbsEntry" INNER JOIN OPMG T2 ON T2."AbsEntry" = T1."AbsEntry" LEFT OUTER JOIN OINV T3 ON T3."DocNum" = T0."DOCNUM" LEFT OUTER JOIN OPCH T4 ON T4."DocNum" = T0."DOCNUM" WHERE T2."NAME" Like '[%0]'

I've tried:

- all manner of LEFT, RIGHT, FULL joins,

- switching the positions of the tables (starting from the invoices first), 

- simplifying by dumping purchase invoice and OPMG altogether and focusing on stageID alone

- using StageID as a link instead of AbsEntry

The document lines must be linked in some way to the stages specifically and not just generally to the project, because when a stage is selected the table PMG4 updates to only those that are attached to that stage. Worth noting that I am not an expert in SQL, just a user of SBO. Any guidance is appreciated.

entry.title: Forecast job execution
entry.content:
Hi,

I needed to setup regular job for forecast execution. Program RMPROG00. It should be run once per month.

Forecast view on material master: Forecast model - S, period indicator - M, Hist. and Forecast periods - 12, Initialization - X. 

-----------------------------------------

When I ran it first time, the forecast values were calculated correctly.

When I ran it second time without changes any parameters, it is not executed at all.

--------------------------

The question is how to setup regular job?

One moment: after the first run indicator "Initialization" was removed. Without this indicator it is not calculated. But we can not every month update this indicator for bunch of materials every month.

Kind regards,

entry.title: Release Purchase Order via Webservice ManagePurchaseOrderIn
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

we use the web service ManagePurchaseOrderIn to create purchase orders from an external system.
When creating these purchase orders, we want to ensure that they are immediately released without any further user interaction and do not remain in the status “In Preparation.”
How can the web service enable an immediate release of the purchase order?

THX

entry.title: Re: The “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event in SAP Analytics Cloud Optimized Story
entry.content:
@N1kh1l Fully Agree. Welcome additional capability but still leaves a lot to wish for.
This approach only detects 'table cell' change scope, not the real delta 'data changes' in the model fact records.

entry.title: Re: Change company code from XYZ to ABC
entry.content: Are you looking to completely replace the existing company code (XYZ) with a new one (ABC), or are you planning to rename the company code in the system? Do you have any master data in that company code? Please provide more detail.

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume data from a odata service
entry.content:
The freaking editor changed what it displayed for my post. This is the prefix, assuming png format (see my original post):

Also, just test with a static base64 value -- you can search Google for "cat" and all the preview pics will be base64. Just so we can narrow down if its something in the data being returned or in the formatting in the UI.

entry.title: Re: Table Buffering in sm30
entry.content: Hi Ryan, Thanks for the Suggestion. I have tried the same. Actually, I was trying to do it to increase the performance when the table was buffered. But, the time got increased now from the previous by activating this option . I have check few of the blogs related to buffering in table to increase the performance. But, it did not happen in my system. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: I cannot connect to it (SSH, RDP or SAP GUI)
entry.content:
Hi  Arsul,

Are your SSH, RDP and SAP GUI ports properly restricted?

For more information how to restrict your ports, please refer to our documentation. You could try at first to restrict to your own IP and retest the connectivity. If it works for you, the you could define an appropriate IP range if it is required in your case.

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: How to speed-up large IQ database backup
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Our SAP IQ DB size is high, and backup is taking approximately 12 hours to complete.
Could you please let us know how we can optimize the backup so that the backup time will get reduced.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to speed-up large IQ database backup
entry.content:
I advise (general recommendations)

  • Review you backup strategy: Eg. use less full backup and more increment backups

  • Perform full backup during low activity (if possible) and increase max threads for the user performing the full backup. 
    See KBA 0003513918 Full backup is very slow in Large Database - SAP IQ

  • You may consider Virtual Backup method :
       0002461985 - How to Backup Large SAP IQ Database

entry.title: Re: Unable to update telephone number in 'Maintain Busine...
entry.content:
User data including Email Address, Phone number and Location cannot be maintained directly through the Maintain Business Users App.

Kindly refer KBA: 2702122 - Cannot change User Data in Maintain Business Users app - SAP for Me.

entry.title: Set "Prevent Output" flag in Purchase Order Using ManagePurchaseOrderIn Webservice
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I would like to set the “Prevent Output” flag using the ManagePurchaseOrderIn web server. Unfortunately, I can’t find the corresponding section in the WSDL. Has anyone ever implemented such a requirement?

entry.title: Re: Dependency Formula for BOM qty
entry.content:
Hi, Variant Configuration would be the right way to solve this. You can assign a so called selection condition to the BOM component in order to select the bom component depending on a characteristic that holds the quantity and a procedure that sets a so called reference characteristic STPO_MENGE for that component with the value of the characteristic that holds the quantity.

Easy example for a selection condition that triggers the selection of the bom component: $root.BNDL_BNB3CL_COMP_0010_QTY > 0 while $root.BNDL_BNB3CL_COMP_0010_QTY is the characteristic that holds the quantity. You can automatically assign this from the item quantity as well.

Easy example for the procedure that sets the quantity of the bom component: $self.BNDL_BNB3CL_STPO_MENGE = $root.BNDL_BNB3CL_COMP_0010_QTY

It is an interesting scenario that a FERT has a component that is changed at the time the product is ordered. Could you also consider this component as a component of a bundle in which the FERT is sold and not a component of the FERT itself? Example: For installing 1 - 80 units of the product I need 5 power supply units, for  81-160 units I need 10 power supply units and so on.

BR, Thomas

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP IAS as a proxy to Azure AD using OpenID Connect
entry.content:
Hello @Colt, Hello @martijndeboer 

 

Many thanks for this blog and support. 
If I want to use certificates instead of a secret for my IPS, what properties should I configure for the Source and Target Systems instead of using a username and password?
for examle: Source System - Azure

for examle Target

 

Does this need to be used: Authentication=ClientCertificateAuthentication?

How do the Source and Target Systems know how the authentication takes place?

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Re: Issue in XSJS query execution
entry.content:
The error typically occurs due to a mismatch in the database client API usage. In SAP HANA XS Advanced with Node.js, ensure that you are using the hdb module properly, as conn.executeQuery is no longer valid in the updated client as I know. Try using conn.exec(sql, callback) or conn.prepare for parameterized queries.

Double-check your database connection setup in your hdb.xsjs file to ensure compatibility with XS Advanced, and verify the configuration of your @SAP/hana-client and dependencies in package.json to match the module requirements.

entry.title: Re: Forecast job execution
entry.content: One of possible solution I found is to create Forecast Profile with fixed value "Initialization = X". And assign it to material master so that it always has "X".

entry.title: Naming Company Code and Trading Partner
entry.content:
Hi, 

We're in the beginning with an implementation project of SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public edition and are now in the prepare phase. Our customer consist of 10+ companies in several different countries. Our planned set-up for the ledgers are as follow: 
0L - IFRS
2L - Local GAAP 
4G - Group Valuation
From the beginning they will not use 4G but we know that we need to activate it from the beginning if there is any plan of start using it so we'll. They will also use the intercompany parts of the system and we've one questions related to this and namings. The plan for now is to name the company codes the same way as they have in there group-structure and reporting within the group. This would mean that they have the same naming for the company code and trading partner that will be assigned to business partners. Is there any dependencies/limitations if we choose to set-up the system like this related to other part of the system for example Intercompany? 

One project member has previous experience related to set-up the same naming for company code and trading partner that lead to that they were be able to activate ICMR in the system. 

We want to understand what the best practice is for naming of TP-naming and company code naming to avoid any future problems within other parts of the system.

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: Clarification on BU_PARTNER and BP_PARTNR in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

According to prevailing literature, such as “Business Partners in SAP S/4HANA®: The Comprehensive Guide to Customer-Vendor Integration” by Jawad Akhtar, Rheinwerk Publishing, 2022", there appear to be no distinct differences between a "Central Business Partner" and a "Business Partner" in SAP S/4HANA. Both terms seem to be used interchangeably to represent the central concept of business partner management in SAP S/4HANA.

However, while exploring an SAP S/4HANA system, I observed the existence of two distinct objects – BU_PARTNER and BP_PARTNR – along with two different transactions – BUCF and BC15. These objects seem to utilize separate number ranges.

Could you kindly clarify the difference between BU_PARTNER (Central Business Partner) and BP_PARTNR (Business Partner) within the context of SAP S/4HANA business partner management?

Thank you in advance for your insights and support!

Best regards,
Emal Rahman

entry.title: Supplier Reference: Scottish Chemical Industries - SAP Business Network for Procurement
entry.content:
#SLIThoughtLeadership

Link to the quote card: https://www.sap.com/documents/2024/10/4a1dada7-dd7e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Supplier testimonials covering positive experiences/impact on their business process (s) once they started collaborating with their buyers on SAP Business Network.

Supplier share their stories in form of a quote card or video. These assets are then published on SAP Social sites which in turn helps them increase their visibility globally & also help other suppliers to gain more confidence on using the SAP Business Network.

#SLIThoughtLeadership

entry.title: Re: Why we have values in GR/IR account.
entry.content: As far as I understand, the GR/IR account serves as a temporary clearing account to manage timing differences between goods receipts (GR) and invoice receipts (IR). From what I know, balances might occur when Goods are received but not yet invoiced (considered a liability) and Invoices are received but the goods have not been delivered (considered an asset). At the end of each financial period, these balances are usually reviewed and classified to ensure accurate reporting. Any discrepancies are addressed, and remaining amounts may be written off to expense accounts.

entry.title: Re: Pool/parallel/ihm in HANA
entry.content: This allocator is used to manage memory for parallel thread operations in the HANA database. It optimizes memory allocation and deallocation for multi-threaded processes, ensuring efficient usage and reducing contention, especially in high-performance scenarios.

Supplier share their stories in form of a quote card or video. These assets are then published on SAP Social sites which in turn helps them increase their visibility globally & also help other suppliers to gain more confidence on using the SAP Business Network.

entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: SA cml.delivered quantity incorrect
entry.content: Hi, Did you discover the source of the error?

entry.title: How to get current Pay Period Begin Date through business rule?
entry.content:
Need some support with creating a business rule so that changes under Banking details could be made effective current Pay Period Begin Date. This is required to prevent changes being made retrospectively.

I have already tried using Get Pay Calendar Begin or End or Check Date () but that is not preventing changes from being made retrospectively, as it is accepting the change if it is made effective pay period begin date in the past. However the requirement is to pick begin date of the current or future pay period. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Define Statutory Report layout not enabled (F2131)
entry.content: Hello, thank you Parthasarathy, BUT this is NOT for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud, is it? I also found this 3442049 but it's NOT for cloud either.

entry.title: Re: hana on premise atc using simplification db
entry.content: To resolve the issue, you can upload the Simplification Database (SIDB) directly to your development system like described in the note. Download the latest SIDB content (component "CCMSIDB") from the SAP Software Center. Implement SAP Notes 2241080, 3039646, and relevant notes from 2436688 for accurate results. Import the content as per the ABAP Platform help. A separate evaluation system is not required.

entry.title: Re: Cannot find BAPI in Action.
entry.content: If you want to be able to call all BAPI's in this backend you have to switch the Naming Policy to "Prefix"

entry.title: How to read/save AL11 file in ABAP Cloud
entry.content: I would like to know how to access AL11 files in Cloud system. Earlier OPEN DATASET/CLOSE DATASET were the syntax to open and close file. Is that still valid syntax to access file?

entry.title: Role of SAP PCA
entry.content:
Hello All,

after my notice that PCAs will not be responsible for the TVRF and COF, effetive after 1.1.25 i would like to know the future role and process of PCA, which is not clear to me yet and i did not see any explained documentation.

- For consideration> PCA do not need to fill out TVRF and COF anymore, but will do the technical assesment?

-How do the PCA provide SAP the sizing of the systems and BOM verification if this is not done by the TVRF and COF anymore?

BR Noah

entry.title: Simulate Offline mode - Edge integration cell
entry.content:
Hello, Experts.

Recently, we configured the Edge integration cell in AWS Kubernetes. We understand that the EIC can be conducted offline for four hours, as shown in the link below.

Could you guide me through the processes to simulate offline mode for the Edge integration cell?

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/frequently-asked-questions-faq-on-edge-integration-cell/ba-p/13571636

Regards

Sebastian Amulraj

entry.title: GenAI Hub SDK, No deployment found with: deployment.model_name when using gpt-4o or gpt-4o-mini
entry.content:
Hi

I am using the GenAI Hub SDK. I am using the init_llm function to initialize the llm. It works for certain models such as gpt-35 and gpt-4, however when I use gpt-4o or gpt-4o-mini, I get the following error:

'No deployment found with: deployment.model_name == gpt-4o'

The exact code I am using:

from langchain_core.output_parsers import StrOutputParser
from langchain.prompts import PromptTemplate
from gen_ai_hub.proxy.langchain.init_models import init_llm
llm = init_llm('gpt-4o', max_tokens=4500, temperature=0)

entry.title: Get Oldest SFC in Queue At Given Resource (& Queue Management field) - SAP DM
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am looking for a way to retrieve in the production process the SFC that is longest in queue at a given resource, since I need a FIFO logic. Unfortunately, the SFC work lists don't return a timestamp when the SFCs "arrived" at the resource.

During my research I found out the resource public API (v2) has a field called "inQueueManagement" which takes the values FIFO/LIFO. This field does not seem to be documented anywhere.

I am wondering if anyone has found out how to retrieve the oldest SFC in queue of the resource. And if somebody knows what the queueManagement field on resource master data does.

Thank you in advance,
Stephan

entry.title: SAP DM - NC Disposition on Order POD
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I've heard that Nonconformance Disposition Routings like SCRAP is not supported for Order POD.

Is that correct?

If so, where can I find the official information for that?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to read/save AL11 file in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
AL11 doesn't exist in ABAP Cloud. Very simple to answer the question if OPEN DATASET is permitted: read the ABAP Cloud documentation. Now, if you go one step further, who asked you to store to "AL11"? What is your exact requirement?

You may read this blog post for more information: Smooth transition to ABAP for Cloud Development(Ch... - SAP Community

entry.title: How to validate the signup process with data variable
entry.content:
I have login form with 3 values as(page variable) which i need to get check with the data.Users_list(data variable) if username, password, usertype get matched user should get login

pageVars.u_username === data.Users_list[0].fields.username && pageVars.u_pass === data.Users_list[0].fields.password && pageVars.u_type === data.Users_list[0].fields.user_type

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@merituulimelkko

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Incorrect Display of License Type in Business User and User Subscription View
entry.content:
The License Type assigned to the user is displayed incorrectly in the Business User and the User Subscription view.

For example, a user with the "Self Service User" license type is shown as having the "Core/Advanced User" license type in the Business User view.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Display of License Type in Business User an...
entry.content:
The License type displayed in the Business User view is based on the workcenter assigned to the Business User. In contrast, the User Subscription view will only show the highest license type if the user has been assigned multiple license types.

You can also refer: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/multiple-license-types-assigned-through-business-role-not-displayed-for/qaq-p/13956217

entry.title: Re: Table Buffering in sm30
entry.content: Before doing any modification, you have to check what the exact problem is. Do you know how to analyze performance issues?

entry.title: Re: Migration of BOM Stimulation Error
entry.content:
Hi

Open the file in a text editor (e.g. Notepad++) and edit the values. After you have changed the values, save the file using the original file type (.xml) and use it in the migration cockpit.

With kind regards

entry.title: Re: Approval Process for goods receipt
entry.content: did you get the solution for this? It will be helpful if you can share.

entry.title: Re: Lumira Designer - Chart - static color to character
entry.content:
I found a workaround by myself.

I created a structure in the query with restrictions on the characters.

For each character one restriction/ selection.

The goal of course is to identify the user who is printing.

Can anyone help?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: FBL*H transactions - OOM Dump(STATEMENT_MEMORY_LIMIT_FROM_GLOBAL_CONFIG) and analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for your interest, I’m grateful 🙏

statement_memory_limit 300 GB

 

It confuses me,

When a query in FBL3H exceeds 300 GB, it ends with an OOM dump, while... SQL Editor or SE38, it runs successfully, using only 800 MB of memory ?

How is it related to the parameters? Could you please explain it in detail?
